title: Meridian industry config
description: Re-skins a Meridian deployment for a target industry. Rendered to /config.json by helm/templates/industry-configmap.yaml and merged over each SPA's baked defaults (frontends/<app>/src/config/defaults.js) at startup. BROWSER-VISIBLE ONLY — never include secrets. Later phases add `flows`, `data`, and `dynatrace` sections (root additionalProperties stays open for forward compatibility).

name.description: Full brand name shown in the UI (e.g. 'Meridian City').

short.description: Short brand name (e.g. 'Meridian'), used where space is tight.

persona.description: One-line persona used in the assistant system prompt.

colors.description: Brand palette as hex; mapped to CSS variables (--brand, --accent, …) at runtime.

logo.description: URL or path to the brand logo.

favicon.description: URL or path to the favicon.

terminology.description: Maps generic domain nouns (customer, request, incident, asset, workOrder, …) to industry-specific nouns.

screens.description: Which curated screen modules each SPA mounts. (Consumed by the module registry in Phase 2; carried as data in Phase 0.)
